title: Reverse Array
description: The function below should reverse the `dataPoints` array in place, but a critical condition is missing from the loop constraint.
codeTemplate:
def reverse_array(dataPoints):
    left = 0
    right = len(dataPoints) - 1
    while ________:
        dataPoints[left], dataPoints[right] = dataPoints[right], dataPoints[left]
        left += 1
        right -= 1
    return dataPoints
hints: Consider when the two indices cross each other.

title: Sum of Array
description: The accumulator loop is missing its update expression. Fill in the blank so the function returns the correct total.
hints: The loop variable must advance on every iteration.

title: Binary Search
description: A classic binary search — the mid-point calculation is missing. Fill in the blank to avoid integer overflow.
hints: Use lo + (hi - lo) / 2 to prevent overflow.

title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
description: The merge condition inside the while loop is missing. Fill in the blank to merge two sorted lists correctly.
hints: Pick the smaller element; when equal, either side is fine.
